title: SystemVerilog frontend does not implement semantics of always_{ff,comb,latch}
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

Testcase `x.sv`:
```sv
module test (input e, a, output reg b);
  always_comb
  	if (e)
  		b = a;
endmodule
```
Run as: `yosys x.sv -p proc -b ilang`.

## Expected behavior

Latches are not silently inferred in an `always_comb` block.

## Actual behavior

Latches are silently inferred in an `always_comb` block.

## Remarks

Per IEEE Std 1800-2009:

![Screenshot_20190714_143615](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/54771/61185105-bc617000-a644-11e9-8dfd-1f6a7fce3348.png)

Clearly, Yosys does not perform such checks, since it does not produce a warning here. (Why does the spec even specify a warning here and not an error?)

I'll investigate writing a PR to handle SV `always_*` variants in the future.
